title: Uplifting Yucatecan Chicken Empanadas
description: A springy, cozy Yucatecan chicken empanada that balances garam masala flavor with a deep-fry crunch, made diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and add diced chicken, cooking until browned.
Add diced onion and minced garlic, sauté until onion is translucent.
Stir in garam masala, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper, cooking for another minute until fragrant.
Pour in lime juice, mix well, then fold in chopped cilantro and remove from heat.
Let the mixture cool slightly, then drop spoonfuls onto individual empanada dough circles.
Fold each circle over to form a half-moon shape and seal edges with a fork.
Heat 1 tbsp vegetable oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 350°F (175°C).
Fry empanadas in batches for 2-3 minutes per side, or until golden and crispy.
Drain on paper towels to remove excess oil.
Serve hot, optionally with a side of fresh lime wedges.
